$comment: OPT7 callee-Phi inline (D-OPT7-MULTIBLOCK-SPLICE-PHI). pick(k){return k?7:9;} lowers a value-producing ternary to a MIR Phi BEFORE Mem2Reg; with an Inlining-only optimized arm the inliner clones that real Phi via the deferred callee-phi flush. main calls pick(0) → the post-inline fold over the cloned Phi (k==0) reads the cloned wiring → 9. RED-on-disable: transposing the cloned incomings (7<->9) folds pick(0) to 7 ≠ the baseline 9, firing the differential assert.
